overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a survival horror video game, featuring a winding dirt path through grassy terrain with rocky outcrops and dense trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest hiking trail with rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the dark trail, sweeping the flashlight across the path ahead

entered.detail: narrow winding path composed of packed earth and scattered stones, illuminated by flashlight
steep rocky hillside covered with patches of grass rising immediately beside the trail
tall coniferous tree with thick trunk standing prominently beside the trail edge
tall wild grass lining both sides of the trail, swaying slightly in the darkness

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, viewed from a first-person perspective with flashlight in hand. The path winds between a rocky hillside on the left and a prominent large pine tree on the right, with tall grass lining the edges of the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest corridor with rocky wall

events.description: large pine tree passes out of view as the trail continues into denser forest vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the trail as the surroundings transition from the distinctive tree to denser woodland

entered.detail: thick cluster of trees and underbrush replacing the single large pine tree on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, the distinctive large pine tree on the right recedes behind the viewer, replaced by denser forest vegetation. The rocky hillside remains a constant presence on the left but appears further away as the trail progresses, while the flashlight continues to illuminate the winding dirt path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark forest trail that transitions from a landmark-defined path into a denser, more enclosed woodland. It begins with the flashlight illuminating a winding dirt trail flanked by a rocky hillside on the left and a prominent large pine tree on the right. As the camera moves forward, the large pine tree recedes behind the viewer, giving way to increasingly thick forest vegetation. The rocky hillside remains a constant presence on the left, though it gradually appears further away as the path progresses. The scene finally settles into a steady advance through the darkness, with the flashlight beam cutting through the deepening foliage along the dirt track.
